channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The ‘internet of beings’ is the next fronteir that could change humanity and healthcare
item.description: In the 1966 film Fantastic Voyage, a spacecraft and its crew are shrunk to microscopic size and injected into the body of an injured astronaut to remove a life-threatening blood clot from his brain.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation, Fast Company

item.title: I'm slashing my streaming bills by 56% in 2026 – here's my five-step masterplan
item.description: Five ways to cut the cost of Netflix, Disney+ and more by selectively subscribing and cutting unnecessary options.
item.dc:creator: Carrie Marshall, TechRadar

item.title: Acquisition more than IT drove the news in 2025
item.description: Federal IT and acquisition experts say the FedRAMP update and artificial intelligence pilots moving to production were among the big story lines last year. The post Acquisition more than IT drove the news in 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Larry Ellison, not Elon Musk, was the tech titan who defined 2025
item.description: Oracle has embarked on a historic build-out of data centers optimized for AI that’s proceeding faster than some expected.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: What is S/4HANA? SAP’s latest ERP system explained
item.description: What is S/4HANA? S/4HANA is SAP’s latest iteration of its flagship enterprise resource planning (ERP) system. The successor to SAP ECC, S/4HANA is built on an in-memory database and is designed to enable real-time data processing and analysis for businesses.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How to watch Boxing Day Horse Racing 2025 for *FREE*
item.description: Here's our guide on how to watch all the Boxing Day horse racing with the King George VI Chase at Kempton headlining.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Jones, TechRadar

item.title: Disney didn’t animate Hercules’ Titans for its show on Disney Destiny
item.description: Disney is using exoskeleton technology to engineer Hercules’ Titans for a live show at sea, allowing a single performer to control towering characters aboard the Disney Destiny.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Krol, TechRadar

item.title: Best Boxing Day sales 2025: deals from Amazon, Currys, John Lewis, and other leading retailers today
item.description: Looking to do some post-Christmas shopping? We've laid out all of today's best Boxing Day sales in one easy to read list right here - including tech, appliances, home, and much more.
item.dc:creator: Alex Whitelock, TechRadar

item.title: 5 eye-opening Google Android app tricks from 2025
item.description: We talk about tons of tips for making the most of Android and tapping into all the software’s easily overlooked options, features, and shortcuts. But when it comes to real-world productivity, Google’s actual operating system is really only half the story.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 4 mandates for CIOs to bridge the AI trust gap
item.description: For the third consecutive year, the Thinkers360 AI Trust Index has taken the pulse of sentiment toward AI, and the results, once again, are a stark reminder to CIOs and CXOs that the technological innovation curve continues to outpace the ethical and governance structure required to support it.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: A small language model blueprint for automation in IT and HR
item.description: Large language models (LLMs) have grabbed the world’s attention for their seemingly magical ability to instantaneously sift through endless data, generate responses, and even create visual content from simple prompts. But their “small” counterparts aren’t far behind.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How to watch Call the Midwife 2025 Christmas specials online
item.description: With time running out, the Nonnatus head on a rescue mission to Hong Kong. Here's how to watch the Call the Widwife 2025 Christmas specials online anywhere.
item.dc:creator: Tom Wardley, TechRadar

item.title: France’s postal service was hit by a major cyberattack right before Christmas. Here are the hackers who did it
item.description: A pro-Russian hacking group claimed responsibility for a major cyberattack that halted package deliveries by France’s national postal service just days before Christmas, prosecutors said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Time to switch to eSIM? South Korea will now make consumers scan their faces to buy a SIM card and cut down on scams
item.description: South Korea now requires facial scans for SIM registration following data breaches which used fraudulently activated mobile phone numbers.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen, TechRadar

item.title: The hidden cost of launching AI initiatives without strategic clarity
item.description: In the 1980s and 1990s, many large manufacturing companies pursued an offshoring strategy — not always because a careful analysis showed a clear link between offshoring and achieving their business objectives, but because their competitors… The post The hidden cost of launching AI initiatives withou
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Is the Internet's time wrong? NIST warns servers may have lapsed due to a power outage
item.description: NIST warns specific public time servers may be inaccurate after a power outage disrupted atomic clock distribution.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen, TechRadar

item.title: Guess where all the NAND flash components are going? The 8th (yes, eighth) 245TB SSD has been announced amidst race to quench AI storage thirst of hyperscalers
item.description: DapuStor announces a 245TB class SSD as AI workloads continue to shape flash storage priorities in hyperscale data centers.
item.dc:creator: Wayne Williams, TechRadar

item.title: AI power tools: 6 ways to supercharge your terminal
item.description: The command line has always been the bedrock of the developer’s world. Since time immemorial, the CLI was a static place defined by the REPL (read-evaluate-print-loop). But now modern AI tools are changing that.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: A new honor for a leader who’s shaped cybersecurity policy and talent across sectors
item.description: "I do believe that it's not just a mission, it's a calling. And I would encourage every young person to take advantage of the opportunity," said Diana Burley The post A new honor for a leader who’s shaped cybersecurity policy and talent across sectors first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: Army bucks trend, to move forward with $50B MAPS contract
item.description: Despite several agencies pausing or canceling large multiple award contracts, the Army decided to proceed with its MAPS vehicle for professional services. The post Army bucks trend, to move forward with $50B MAPS contract first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Trump administration moves to overhaul how H-1B visas are granted, ending lottery system
item.description: The Department of Homeland Security is replacing its lottery system for H-1B visas with a new approach prioritizing skilled, higher-paid foreign workers.
item.dc:creator: Joey Cappelletti, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Android Sound Notifications help you catch key alerts
item.description: Discover Android's new Sound Notifications feature that alerts you to smoke alarms, doorbells, and baby cries even when wearing headphones.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How a former Forest Service employee changed the future of housing in California
item.description: One April night eight years ago, two tech leaders sat down with a former Forest Service employee at Terroir, a natural wine bar in San Francisco. Then they started sketching out a plan that would eventually reshape California’s housing policy.
item.dc:creator: Adele Peters, Fast Company

item.title: Google agrees to acquire infrastructure builder Intersect to accelerate capacity development
item.description: Google parent Alphabet is taking steps to enable speedier addition of capacity to feed AI’s increasing demands with its announcement of plans to buy data center and energy company Intersect.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Stop letting ‘urgent’ derail delivery. Manage interruptions proactively
item.description: As engineers and managers, we all have been interrupted by those unplanned, time-sensitive requests (or tasks) that arrive outside normal planning cadences. An “urgent” Slack, a last-minute requirement or an exec ask is enough to nuke your standard agile rituals.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Netflix suspension scam targets your inbox
item.description: The Christmas season brings a surge in Netflix phishing scams targeting shoppers with fake emails. Stacey P received convincing scam but verified account first.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Top 5 enterprise tech priorities for 2026
item.description: It’s the season for “looking ahead to next year” articles that tell some group or another what they should be doing or what some “expert” says they should do. Let’s take a different slant and focus on what one group— arguably the most important tech buyer group — actually says they’re going to do.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Building AI agents the safe way
item.description: If you want to know what is actually happening in generative AI—not what vendors pretend in their press releases, but what developers are actually building—Datasette founder Simon Willison gets you pretty close to ground truth.
item.dc:creator: Info World
